risks.description: Model misclassification may deny legitimate healthcare payments
risks.mitigation: Manual review queue for health-sector transactions

risks.description: False positives in emergency transaction blocking
risks.mitigation: Whitelist for emergency merchant category codes

risks.description: Potential demographic bias in fraud scoring
risks.mitigation: Quarterly bias audit against protected characteristics

risks.description: Model used on population outside training distribution (e.g. new regions)
risks.mitigation: Input validation + distribution shift detection alerts

risks.description: Adversarial inputs crafted to bypass fraud detection
risks.mitigation: Adversarial robustness testing in quarterly model reviews
risks.residual_risk: Sophisticated adversarial attacks remain possible but economically unfeasible for most threat actors
